_comment: Pre-biopsy diagnostic profile: 67M with new pancytopenia + 38% circulating blasts on peripheral smear, fever 38.5°C, no bleeding diathesis. Hyperleukocytosis (WBC 95k) + DIC labs pending. Engine should match WORKUP-SUSPECTED-ACUTE-LEUKEMIA and emit Diagnostic Brief — NOT a Treatment Plan (CHARTER §15.2 C7). BM aspirate + flow cytometry + cytogenetics + NPM1/FLT3/IDH1/IDH2/CEBPA NGS panel required for ELN 2022 risk classification before treatment selection.

suspicion.presentation: 67M presents to ED with 2-week fatigue, 1-week intermittent fevers (max 38.5°C), gingival bleeding × 3 days. CBC: WBC 95k with 38% circulating blasts on peripheral_smear, Hgb 7.2, plt 28. PT/PTT mildly prolonged, fibrinogen 180 (concerning for DIC). LDH 1240. Suspicion of acute leukemia — possibly APL given coagulopathy. No prior cytotoxic therapy, no antecedent MDS documented. ED started TLS prophylaxis (IV fluids, allopurinol). Hyperleukocytosis_with_blasts present.
